page.title: Skills Catalog
page.description: A curated front door to the 100 public AI agent skills in synthetic-mind, spanning control-plane behavior, PM workflows, engineering, data, and docs.
page.intro: A curated front door to the 100 public skills in this repo. For the full markdown catalog, use skills/README.md.
page.subintro: Every card here opens a local detail page. For the full repo inventory, use the markdown catalog.

skills.name: start-of-day
skills.desc: Morning triage: Slack → Gmail → Calendar. Surfaces unreads, drafts replies, shows schedule.

skills.name: slack
skills.desc: Search, read, and post messages across Slack workspaces.

skills.name: gcal
skills.desc: Create, update, RSVP, and check availability on Google Calendar.

skills.name: reviewing-calendar
skills.desc: Visual weekly calendar with conflict detection and color coding.

skills.name: gdrive
skills.desc: Read/write Google Docs, Sheets, Slides. Search and manage Drive files.
skills.example: "create a Google Doc titled Q1 Plan"

skills.name: gmail
skills.desc: Search, read, send, draft, and manage emails, labels, and filters.
skills.example: "draft a reply to the latest email from Sarah"

skills.name: notion
skills.desc: Read, search, create, and update pages in your Notion workspace.

skills.name: reflect
skills.desc: Guided reflection for performance reviews. Asks questions, synthesizes responses.

skills.name: writing-feedback
skills.desc: Draft performance feedback — self-reflections, peer reviews, manager evaluations.

skills.name: controlling-computer
skills.desc: Control macOS via AppleScript — apps, windows, volume, dark mode.

skills.name: viewing-figma-files
skills.desc: Inspect Figma files, view structure, export images, read comments.
skills.example: "inspect the checkout frame in this Figma"

skills.name: drafting-docs
skills.desc: Draft and format Google Docs with consistent styling.

skills.name: cash-rounding-responder
skills.desc: Triage and draft replies to feature feedback emails.

skills.name: shipped-announcements
skills.desc: Craft and post launch announcements to Slack.

skills.name: slack-saved-triage
skills.desc: Prioritize and group Slack saved messages. Triage your save-for-later queue.

skills.name: manager-slack-summary
skills.desc: Weekly summary of Slack conversations with your manager. Groups by topic.

skills.name: linear
skills.desc: Create, search, update issues and projects in Linear.
skills.example: "create a Linear issue for the login bug"

skills.name: plan-to-linear
skills.desc: Convert a structured plan into Linear issues and projects in bulk.

skills.name: linear-to-execution
skills.desc: Pick up a Linear issue and prepare for implementation.

skills.name: project-status
skills.desc: Aggregate project status from Slack, Drive, GitHub, and feature flags.

skills.name: historical-info
skills.desc: Search across sources to find what you've been working on.
skills.example: "what have I worked on this week?"

skills.name: logging-feature-requests
skills.desc: Digest feature requests from Slack and log them to a tracking sheet.

skills.name: blueprint-intake
skills.desc: Create roadmap projects from Slack threads or pasted context.
skills.example: "turn this thread into a roadmap project"

skills.name: blueprint-project-status
skills.desc: Audit and update project statuses in bulk. Cross-reference connected resources.

skills.name: blueprint-project-update
skills.desc: Draft and add weekly project updates from connected resources.

skills.name: blueprint-status-update
skills.desc: Sync project statuses from Linear, Slack, and Jira.

skills.name: weekly-status-summary
skills.desc: Generate consolidated weekly summary from project updates and post to Slack.

skills.name: roadmap-intake
skills.desc: Create roadmap projects from Slack threads, docs, or links.

skills.name: monitoring-prs
skills.desc: Watch open PRs for new comments and CI failures. Auto-fix and respond.

skills.name: checking-your-lens
skills.desc: Add a final judgment pass so the output sounds grounded, direct, and context-aware.

skills.name: closing-day
skills.desc: Wrap the day with a short carry-forward snapshot so tomorrow starts from a real handoff.

skills.name: syncing-context
skills.desc: Refresh the lightweight state layer after a plan change or before a follow-on session.

skills.name: gh-pr-read
skills.desc: Read and summarize GitHub pull requests using the gh CLI.

skills.name: pr-manager
skills.desc: Commit changes, create/update PRs. Supports Graphite stacked PRs.

skills.name: push-pr
skills.desc: Quick push branch and create a draft PR with AI-generated description.

skills.name: address-pr-comments
skills.desc: Fix unresolved PR comments, commit per-comment, resolve threads.

skills.name: code-review-general
skills.desc: Address code review feedback — prioritize human comments, verify changes.

skills.name: rebasing-git-branches
skills.desc: Rebase branches onto upstream targets, resolve conflicts.

skills.name: git-worktree
skills.desc: Manage git worktrees for working on multiple branches simultaneously.

skills.name: codesearch
skills.desc: Search code patterns across company repositories to find implementations, owners, and related usage.
skills.example: "find every place we validate JWT headers"

skills.name: check-ci
skills.desc: Check, debug, and fix CI builds and test failures. Loops until green.

skills.name: cloning-squareup-repos
skills.desc: Clone repositories using the correct SSH remote and conventions.

skills.name: hermit
skills.desc: Manage hermetic developer tool packages per-repository.

skills.name: protos
skills.desc: Search and inspect protocol buffer definitions, messages, services, and enums.

skills.name: snowflake
skills.desc: Run SQL queries on Snowflake with SSO authentication.

skills.name: databricks
skills.desc: Run SQL on Databricks Lakehouse. Search tables and catalogs.

skills.name: looker
skills.desc: Interact with Looker dashboards, tiles, queries, explores, and models.

skills.name: data-analyst
skills.desc: Full analysis pipeline with follow-up questions, charts, and visualizations.

skills.name: airtable
skills.desc: Manage Airtable bases, tables, records with filtering and sorting.

skills.name: graphql-schema-discovery
skills.desc: Discover and navigate GraphQL schemas via MCP or introspection.

skills.name: datadog
skills.desc: Query logs, metrics, traces, monitors, RUM, and CI visibility.

skills.name: launchdarkly-cli
skills.desc: Create, toggle, list, and manage LaunchDarkly feature flags.

skills.name: pos-releases
skills.desc: Query release train schedules, branch cuts, and rollout dates.

skills.name: snagit
skills.desc: Capture screenshots and recordings from macOS.

skills.name: free-disk-space
skills.desc: Survey and clean up disk space on macOS.

skills.name: ios-simulator
skills.desc: Manage iOS simulators — start, stop, create devices for testing.

skills.name: android-emulator
skills.desc: Manage Android emulators (AVDs) for testing.

skills.name: agent-browser
skills.desc: Browser automation — navigate, click, fill forms, take screenshots.
skills.example: "open the page and take a screenshot"

skills.name: writing-requirements-docs
skills.desc: Write PRDs from rough notes with auto-sourced evidence.

skills.name: spec-creator
skills.desc: Create product specs using structured templates, synced to Linear.

skills.name: product
skills.desc: Search product docs, requirements, and reference material.

skills.name: feedback-searcher
skills.desc: Search and synthesize user feedback across multiple sources.

skills.name: feature-request-scanner
skills.desc: Daily scan of feedback channels for product feature requests.

skills.name: launch-a-product
skills.desc: Guide PMs through GTM launch readiness and rollout prep.

skills.name: prototype-builder
skills.desc: Scaffold and build interactive HTML prototypes for product features.

skills.name: test-plan-creator
skills.desc: Generate test plans and acceptance criteria from product specs.

skills.name: web-research
skills.desc: Search the web for competitors, trends, and best practices.

skills.name: ecom-great-stores
skills.desc: Search and surface example seller sites by industry, feature, or use case.

skills.name: ecom-research
skills.desc: Search seller research insights: quotes, site reviews, competitive analysis, CSAT.

skills.name: saving-cash-rounding-feedback

skills.name: trust-feature-validation
skills.desc: Validate feature behavior during rollouts. Spot-check users, audit data.

skills.name: staging-account-builder
skills.desc: Provision full staging accounts with payments, catalog, orders, and labor data.

skills.name: auto-pilot
skills.desc: Routes any request to the right skill(s) automatically.

skills.name: synthetic-mind
skills.desc: Publish thoughts, processes, and updates into this repo.

skills.name: skill-management
skills.desc: List, inspect, add, remove, and update skills.

skills.name: rpi
skills.desc: Research → Plan → Implement for complex, multi-step tasks.

skills.name: rpi-research
skills.desc: Deep-dive research phase — understand existing code and systems.

skills.name: rpi-plan
skills.desc: Create phased implementation plans with success criteria.

skills.name: rpi-implement
skills.desc: Execute approved plans phase by phase with verification.

skills.name: rpi-iterate
skills.desc: Update plans based on feedback or new requirements.

skills.name: swarm
skills.desc: Multi-perspective investigation with adversarial challenge and consensus.

skills.name: ralph-loop
skills.desc: Iterative work-review loop using two AI models.

skills.name: memory
skills.desc: Persistent cross-session memory — captures observations, generates summaries.

skills.name: kb-distill
skills.desc: Distill raw observations into structured knowledge notes.

skills.name: kb-promote
skills.desc: Promote durable notes into rules, memory, or reusable skills.

skills.name: kb-style-matrix
skills.desc: Build a communication voice profile from your actual writing.

skills.name: communication-coach
skills.desc: Concise, high-signal coaching for internal communication.

skills.name: jack-guidance
skills.desc: Concise, direct coaching for internal communication. High-signal, low-fluff.

skills.name: eng-ai-chat
skills.desc: Search internal knowledge grounded in app context. AI-powered answers.

skills.name: blox

skills.name: merchant-lookup

skills.name: converting-gdocs-to-markdown
skills.desc: Convert Google Docs into markdown for repo-friendly publishing.

skills.name: summarize-video
